positive: A vibrant, whimsical arrangement of celestial motifs and mythical flora, centered composition. Main elements include detailed line art constellations forming intricate geometric patterns, intertwined with stylized glowing bioluminescent flowers and crystalline leaves. The style should be sophisticated modern vector illustration, highly detailed and graphic, reminiscent of stained-glass window motifs combined with scientific etching. Color palette is deep indigo, cosmic gold, emerald green, and soft lavender accents. Strong, clean silhouettes with high contrast, optimized for print on apparel. Flat lay composition view.
